sections.paragraph:
verb לפקוד

to command, order; count, number; visit, attend to; haunt; chastise, punish; remember

verb להיפקד

be counted, numbered; be absent, missing; be ordered, commanded

verb לפקד

to command, order

verb להתפקד

to count off

verb להפקיד

to deposit, entrust to; appoint, charge someone with

verb הופקד

be deposited; be appointed, charged with

verb לפקד (>>פיקד)

to command, order

masculine noun

chief inspector

noun

enumerator
